checks.finding: Each of REQ-001..REQ-006 states a concrete checkable mechanism bound to at least one acceptance criterion naming an observable pass/fail signal (exit code, denial decision, document text, diagnostic message).
acceptance-tests.md maps every REQ-001..REQ-006 to at least one AC/TEST row (REQ-005 -> AC-010, AC-011, AC-014); no goal lacks a row.
All fourteen ACs describe externally observable outcomes including the explicit no-PR vacuous-pass case (AC-014).

Non-goals exclude protected-suffix-table consolidation (SEC-15), a complete Bash interpreter, SDD_SUDO/kill-switch/WFI/Second-Approval/contract changes, prompt/schedule rewrites, and lite-track cross-model.

ASCII-only .ps1, the B1-B3 security table, agent-restricted-to-human-copy roles, and the round-1 fix binding Cross-Model-Waiver validity to a co-located human Approval:Approved mark with Field Definitions are all stated.

Each high/critical risk ties to a validation surface in the ACs: incomplete-.ps1-port -> AC-001 per-suffix parity; over-aggressive cwd-tracking -> AC-003/AC-005 read-only corpus; id-token removal -> AC-010 pinned-version check.
